description_long: This is a bold, masculine ring featuring a prominent, faceted blue gemstone set in a raised prong setting at its center. The band is thick and robust, crafted from a dark, metallic material with a smooth, glossy finish. Flanking the central stone on both sides are clusters of smaller, round white stones, arranged symmetrically in a geometric pattern. The ring's shoulders are broad and taper smoothly toward the underside, providing a substantial and weighty appearance. The overall design is modern and geometric, with clean lines and a focus on symmetry. The combination of the deep blue gemstone and the contrasting white stones gives the piece a striking, contemporary look.
description: A thick, dark metal ring with a large blue gemstone at its center, flanked by clusters of small white stones in a geometric arrangement. The design is modern and bold, with a glossy finish and substantial band.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large blue gemstone in a raised setting, with symmetrical clusters of white stones on either side and the thick, rounded band.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the broad, smooth shoulder of the ring and the cluster of white stones, with the blue gemstone visible at the top.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the blue gemstone and white stone clusters, with the band forming a complete circle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the other cluster of white stones and the blue gemstone from the side.
